whatsNew: Fixed What Should I Do Next so assignments completed through RPL are skipped without requesting supporting evidence or portfolio upload.
Separated assignment RPL from individual-KSB recognition so TA, PA and WT are only marked RPL when the assignment itself was explicitly selected.
Stopped unrelated KSB evidence markers from displaying RPL.
Added the same tick or cross animation to Functional Skills, CSCS, In-house Training, Trade Academy and EPA knowledge questionnaires.
Every questionnaire question now highlights the selected answer and reveals the correct answer before moving to the next slide.
Retained the existing animated feedback in Revision, Knowledge Refresh and RPL Refresher.
